title: festuca caspica
intro: Festuca caspica is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Festuca caspica has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and exerting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Festuca caspica can be made by infusing its leaves and flowers in water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
